title: helianthemum apenninum subsp. apenninum
intro: Helianthemum apenninum subsp. apenninum, also known as Rock Rose or Apennine Rock Rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective against infections and wounds. The plant is said to offer health benefits such as reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality due to its sedative and anxiolytic properties. Helianthemum apenninum subsp. apenninum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or ointment, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and digestive issues.
